name: Strawberry Frozen Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in milk, in a custard cup. Set the cup in boiling water; stir until the gelatin is completely dissolved.
2. Combine yogurt, sugar, and salt. Stir in the gelatin mixture. Stir in berries and lemon juice. Chill until slightly thickened.
3. Beat until foamy. Fold in whipped cream.
4. Pour the mixture into a metal ice-cube tray. Cover with foil; freeze.
Note: I have also made this with about half of 1 pint of fresh strawberries, well crushed. Then froze it in a Donvier ice cream maker. Delicious!
